steps.title: Use the growth claim
steps.content: The sentence needs an example of several states seeing rapid growth in copper production. The best graph evidence should show increases across multiple states over time.

steps.title: Match broad increases
steps.content: A focuses on a slowdown in one state, B compares states in one year, and C gives one Arizona value without showing growth. The matching choice covers Arizona, Michigan, and Montana rising substantially from 1889 to 1909. The answer is D.
